vocab.meaning: trạng thái thể chất đỉnh cao
vocab.example: Engaging in competitive swimming requires maintaining a peak physical condition through rigorous daily training.

vocab.meaning: một buổi tập luyện cực kỳ gian khổ/vất vả
vocab.example: I enjoy the sense of accomplishment that follows a grueling workout at the crossfit gym.

vocab.meaning: sự hưng phấn tột độ (đột ngột)
vocab.example: The exhilarating rush of adrenaline when surfing a large wave is what keeps me going back to the ocean.

vocab.meaning: nghị lực/sự kiên cường về mặt tinh thần
vocab.example: Long-distance running is as much about mental fortitude as it is about cardiovascular endurance.

vocab.meaning: dùng mưu mẹo/kỹ thuật để vượt qua đối thủ
vocab.example: In basketball, I take pride in my ability to outmaneuver the opponent using quick footwork and deceptive dribbling.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần đồng đội/thân hữu
vocab.example: Participating in amateur football leagues is a fantastic way to foster a sense of camaraderie among colleagues.
Playing tennis twice a week is my primary way of counteracting the effects of a sedentary lifestyle at the office.

vocab.meaning: sự nhanh nhẹn không đối thủ/vô song
vocab.example: Elite badminton players possess unrivaled agility, allowing them to cover the entire court in a split second.

vocab.meaning: khả năng thể thao thuần túy (tài năng bẩm sinh/thực thụ)
vocab.example: I am often awestruck by the sheer athleticism displayed by professional NBA players during a game.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng sức bền cơ bắp
vocab.example: High-repetition weightlifting is essential if you want to build muscular endurance for rowing.
